decisions.reason: Appears to represent: Industry interface / bus standard. Registry search: No exact canonical, normalized canonical, exact alias, or normalized alias match. An industry interface referenced by several driver categories; it is meaningful context but does not require a Domain Layer node. Provisional interpretation was external, but it cannot be recommended without authoritative verification.

Appears to represent: Management policy-processing component. Registry search: No exact canonical, normalized canonical, exact alias, or normalized alias match. Appears to mean the policy-evaluation component of mobile device management. It could overlap Endpoint Manager or merit a governed management component, but the intended identity is not established. Provisional interpretation was requires_more_evidence, but it cannot be recommended without authoritative verification.

Appears to represent: Asset discovery and inventory platform. Registry search: No exact canonical, normalized canonical, exact alias, or normalized alias match. A distinct asset-inventory system belongs in a future asset/configuration-management domain rather than being folded into Endpoint Manager. Provisional interpretation was deferred for Asset and Configuration Management, but it cannot be recommended without authoritative verification.

Appears to represent: Host file-integrity security agent. Registry search: No exact canonical, normalized canonical, exact alias, or normalized alias match. A meaningful security-agent role, but not essential as a canonical node for the current compatibility and compliance scope. Provisional interpretation was external, but it cannot be recommended without authoritative verification.

Appears to represent: Centralized log collection platform. Registry search: No exact canonical, normalized canonical, exact alias, or normalized alias match. A log collection and aggregation platform is a coherent future observability concept, separate from the current endpoint management entities. Provisional interpretation was deferred for Observability, but it cannot be recommended without authoritative verification.

Appears to represent: Software deployment and distribution platform. Registry search: No exact canonical, normalized canonical, exact alias, or normalized alias match. A software distribution platform is a coherent management capability, but its product-neutral identity and boundary require a future software-lifecycle domain. Provisional interpretation was deferred for Software Lifecycle Management, but it cannot be recommended without authoritative verification.

Appears to represent: Alert evaluation capability. Registry search: No exact canonical, normalized canonical, exact alias, or normalized alias match. A generic capability/component phrase without a stable product-neutral identity; it is not suitable as a related entity.
